display.purpose: Hero titles, splash screens, big win numbers. Lexend black, uppercase, italic.

body.purpose: Instructions and paragraphs. Plus Jakarta Sans.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav items, chips, stat captions. Uppercase tracked Lexend.

shadows.name: tactile-card
shadows.purpose: Signature panel lift for cards, panels, avatar tiles.

shadows.name: tactile-button
shadows.purpose: Resting lift on primary buttons; collapses to 0 2px on press.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Button press down on active state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single action control. Arcade Lime block with a hard Violet-Deep offset that presses down.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:#a3e635; color:#0c0c1f; font-family:'Lexend',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em; font-size:0.75rem; padding:16px 40px; border:2px solid #0c0c1f; border-radius:0.75rem; box-shadow:0 6px 0 0 #4c1d95; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease, background 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#bef264; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(4px); box-shadow:0 2px 0 0 #4c1d95; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:4px solid #ff3bc0; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary / cancel control. Transparent with Ink label and bordered.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:transparent; color:#e2e0fc; font-family:'Lexend',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em; font-size:0.75rem; padding:16px 40px; border:2px solid #958da3; border-radius:0.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:background 0.12s ease, border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:#7000ff; background:#1e1e32; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:4px solid #ff3bc0; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Raised panel with the Tactile Card offset and a Violet-Deep border.
components.html:
Level 3

Read every word aloud.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#28283d; color:#e2e0fc; border:2px solid #7000ff; border-radius:0.75rem; padding:24px; box-shadow:8px 8px 0 0 #4c1d95; } .ds-card-title { font-family:'Lexend',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.02em; font-size:1.25rem; margin:0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; line-height:1.6; color:#ccc3da; margin:0; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Void well with a Magenta focus ring — never a soft glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background:#0c0c1f; color:#e2e0fc; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; padding:8px 16px; border:2px solid #958da3; border-radius:0.5rem; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#ccc3da; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:#7000ff; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #ff3bc0; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Pill label in Surface with an Outline hairline.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#1e1e32; color:#e2e0fc; font-family:'Lexend',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em; font-size:0.75rem; padding:8px 16px; border-radius:9999px; border:1px solid #4a4457; }

components.name: Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Lit-up cabinet button: solid Arcade Lime block with a hard Lime-Deep offset.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; background:#a3e635; color:#0c0c1f; font-family:'Lexend',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em; font-size:0.75rem; padding:16px; border:2px solid #0c0c1f; border-radius:0.5rem; box-shadow:6px 6px 0 0 #3f6212; transform:translate(-2px,-2px); text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav-icon { font-family:'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size:20px; }

components.name: Progress Surge
components.description: The signature reward bar: Ink-Muted track, Arcade Lime fill with a hard inset shadow, eased to 100%.
components.css: .ds-progress { width:100%; height:12px; background:#0c0c1f; border:2px solid #7000ff; border-radius:9999px; overflow:hidden; } .ds-progress > span { display:block; height:100%; background:#a3e635; box-shadow:inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition:width 1s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); }

narrative.overview: Word-O-Matic is a glowing arcade cabinet in a dark room. The indigo-void canvas is the cabinet's shell; every screen is a playable panel lit by one electric action color and framed in hard, physical shadows that read as real depth. The personality is playful, electric, and bold: confident arcade energy without losing clarity, a little mischievous, never childish and never corporate. This system explicitly rejects glassmorphism AI-slop, generic corporate edtech SaaS, and infantilized baby styling, and forbids raw default palette leaks (slate/zinc/purple/lime-400).
keyCharacteristics: Indigo-void canvas; depth from hard offset shadows, not soft blur.
One action color (Arcade Lime) carries intent; everything else is chrome.
Lexend black-uppercase headings; Plus Jakarta Sans for reading.
Chunky 2-4px borders and large forgiving tap targets for small hands.
Motion is physical: buttons press down, streaks shake, progress surges.

rules.name: The One Action Color Rule
rules.body: Arcade Lime is the only 'do this' color on any screen; it appears on ≤10-15% of the surface. Quest Cyan may mark a second, explicitly different action; never a third.

rules.name: The Violet-Deep Shadow Rule
rules.body: Hard offset shadows use #7000ff (Violet Deep) or the surface's own dark tone — never a soft gray blur.

rules.name: The Black-Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Every heading and button is font-black, uppercase, and tracked. Lowercase or light weights read as 'app', not 'arcade'.

rules.name: The Physical Press Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear as a response to state (rest, hover, active), never decoration. A control at rest has its full offset; on press it shrinks and drops.

dos: Do use Arcade Lime as the only 'action' color; let its rarity signal intent.
Do use hard offset Violet-Deep shadows (8px 8px 0 0 #4c1d95) for depth — never soft blur.
Do set every heading and button in Lexend font-black uppercase with tracking.
Do keep tap targets large (>=44px) and borders chunky (2-4px).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: keep state changes, drop the translate.
Do use the named tokens (bg-action, text-ink, border-chrome-deep).
donts: Don't use glassmorphism AI-slop: blurred glass cards, backdrop-filter sheen, gradient-clipped text.
Don't build a generic corporate edtech SaaS look — blue/white dashboards, stock illustrations, flat minimalism.
Don't infantilize: no baby-cartoon styling, no low-contrast undifferentiated shapes.
Don't use raw default palette leaks (slate-*, zinc-*, purple-*, lime-400, rose-500).
Don't add a third action color; lime + cyan is the ceiling.
Don't use side-stripe borders (>1px colored left/right border) as accents.
